note: The gjoa knobs registry. Each knob is a reversible pref (the feature is PRESENT, just toggled). gjoaDefault is gjoa's shipped value; flip the toggle to override. Costs are MEASURED or honestly 'unmeasured' — never invented.

measurement.basis: Memory/CPU saving unmeasured on a gjoa binary. To measure: enable in a control build, capture about:memory at idle+30s, disable, recapture, report the delta + date.
Egress/data feature, not a measured perf win. Cost is the data sent, not memory; vanity-until-proven for memory.
about:memory delta unmeasured on gjoa. Measure on a baseline where Pocket is ENABLED — you cannot claim a saving for a feature that was never running.
Disables Sync/FxA. Cost is feature loss, not a measured perf win. Unmeasured.
Egress (recommendation service). Unmeasured for memory; vanity-until-proven.
Remote config/experiment delivery. Egress vector; memory cost unmeasured.
gjoa ships a custom new-tab; Activity Stream is replaced, not just off. Re-enabling does not restore gjoa's new-tab routing. Memory delta unmeasured.
Egress to contile.services.mozilla.com. No functional cost (custom new-tab). Memory unmeasured.

SECURITY GATE (finding F2), not a perf knob: default OFF means only curated baseline scriptlets run; flipping ON allows arbitrary +js() from uBO filter lists (user-supplied JS injection). Leave OFF unless you trust your lists.

profiles.title: LibreWolf mode
profiles.claim: LibreWolf-grade privacy DEFAULTS, as one toggle.
profiles.disclaimer: NOT 'as secure as LibreWolf'. These prefs are only part of LibreWolf's hardening (their compile-time disables and ~20 C++ patches are not here), and flipping this changes none of gjoa's own added surface (the adblock classifier, content actors, custom about: pages).

tradeoffs.title: resistFingerprinting has a high UX cost
tradeoffs.detail: Breaks canvas-reliant sites, letterboxes the window, reports UTC timezone + a generic UA. Default-off for a reason; on only inside this profile.

tradeoffs.title: Safe Browsing stays ON (conflict, not flipped)
tradeoffs.detail: LibreWolf neuters Safe Browsing, but gjoa deliberately KEPT download-reputation on (security finding F5). LibreWolf mode does NOT disable it here — the conflict is surfaced, not silently resolved.

tradeoffs.title: Prefetch stays ON (gjoa speed decision)
tradeoffs.detail: LibreWolf disables prefetch/dns-prefetch; gjoa keeps them on for page-load speed. Not changed by this profile.
